titleStmt.title: SII 11.146: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 146. (B.K. No. 132 of 1926-27.) KŌṬAVUMACHIGI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SŌMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription of the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) praises at length the glory of the king's subordinate, Mahāsāmantādhipati, Mahāpradhāna, Bāṇasavergaḍe, Anantapāḷarasa, who was the governor of Beḷvala Three-Hundred and Purigeṟe Three-Hundred. Mention is specially made of his large bounties for feeding and for educational purposes. The immediate purpose of the record is not clear; but probably it was a gift by the chief himself to the god Svayaṁbhū Sōmēśvara. The record was composed by the poet Chandra-Bhaṭṭa.

The inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 2 • • • • Pushya, śu. [1]1, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkrānti. The details agree in Śaka 1021, Pramāthin, which was Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 23. The corresponding English date would be A.D. 1099, December 25, Sunday; f.d.t. ·27.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
ḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śaṁ�rāya namaḥ . gaṇapatayē namaḥ
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakulatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava
rddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire śrī rājadhāni kalyāṇa
ḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvutti
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati
nāyakaṁ vibhudhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ nuḍidumattennaṁ gōtra
ganāputra turayarēvanta sāhasōttuṁga
di samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmahāpradhānaṁ bāṇasavergga
nanantapāḷarasar beḷvalamānāṟu purigeṟemūnūṟu
. kaṁda . Inteseva lōkada dīnānāthārtthigaḷga kaisārvva
hījaṁ tānenipa nanaṁtapāḷadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . jaḷanidhiparivṛta
dadhīcikānīnarenippanibaroḷeṇe toṇe
naṁtapāḷanaudāryyateyiṁ . vṛtta . paramārtthaṁ baga
surasaṁdōhanivāsavāpīsu�ṭā
nannadāna varavidyādānamaṁ māḍi
śiṣṭēṣṭārtthikaḷpadrumaṁ . ka .
nanupamaudāryya
ramaṇanenipanāra
gaṇi paṁḍitapuṁḍarīkavanavana
yakaratnaṁ . vṛttaṁ . dhareyo
caṁdra vibhu
nudyattējamā
. vacana . śrīmaccāḷukya
vikramavarṣada 2 pauṣyaśuddha
11 Ādityavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyaṁdu . kaṁ . ḷbe
ḷvalamadaṟo yoḷdharege
raṇavaddharmma
ṇigeyella mudade biṭṭa geṟegiṁtelliya śāsana
ḷkaḍeyisi . Iṁtī dharmmanidhānaṁ ḷpō
dudeṁdu dhare pogaḷa nāyaka ciṁtāmaṇi
ḷitadhairyyaṁ . vacana . Ī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidava rkkurukṣētradoḷaṁ vāraṇā
siyoḷaṁ kōṭikavileyaṁ brāhmaṇargga dānaṁgeyda phaḷa vi
danaḷidava rvvāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ vēḷukōṭikavi
leyumaṁ brāhmaṇaruvanaḷida pātakanakku . ślōkaṁ . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānē
tānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē
rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasu
dhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhū
mistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . Ī dharmmamaṁ svayaṁbhudēvarige ko
rasugaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuvar . caturadhikaśatadharāmara
tatiśayadiṁ caṁ
drabhaṭṭakavi viracisidaṁ . śrīsvayaṁbhūsōmēśvarāya namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 11.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
